artPrompt: A gaunt three-eyed mutant cleric stands waist-deep in toxic reservoir shallows, arms raised mid-sermon, sickly bioluminescent light streaming from gilled flesh as murky green water ripples outward. Rusted pipes and a crumbling treatment plant haze under a bruised stormy sky behind. Heroic low film-still angle of fervent aquatic prophecy at epic depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Prophet of the Deep End
text:
Whenever Prophet of the Deep End attacks, roll a six-sided die.
1-2 — put two sludge counters on a creature you control.
3-4 — draw a card and you gain 2 life.
5-6 — each opponent sacrifices a creature with the fewest sludge counters among creatures they control. The Prophet warned them. The Prophet always warns them.
flavorText: It stood waist-deep at the public beach, sermonizing to the lifeguards until they, too, understood.
